title: Artiem Half Menorca Triathlon
description: The island's flagship triathlon returns to Fornells with its half distance (1,900 m swim, 90 km bike, 21.1 km run) and a short version (1,000 m, 34 km, 9 km). The eleventh edition is scheduled for 27 September 2026, with the bay of Fornells as its setting.
